menuItems.label: Press

props.html:
Media & Materials

If you’d like to request images, information and all things media you can please contact maria@kitandkaboodleagency.com.

Photo Shoots

If you’re looking to schedule a photo shoot at O Beach Ibiza, please email us at maria@kitandkaboodleagency.com with as many details as possible. If we’re able to accommodate you, we’ll reply touch within 48 hours

Collaborations

If you’re a journalist, editor, influencer, or willing to do a collaboration with us please email us at maria@kitandkaboodleagency.com

Influencer Requests

O Beach Ibiza is happy to offer hospitality to influencers depending on availability. If you´d like to highlight O Beach Ibiza on your social media channels please email us at maria@kitandkaboodleagency.com to start the conversation.
